free_text: n + 209Bi mean field between -20 and 60 MeV
Converted to new date fromat, lower case.
Systematic uncertainty estimated to be less than 2%
Data received by email from R.K. Das, Nov. 1990.
Statistical uncertainty for energies up to 12 MeV
generally less than 3% for scattering angles less
than 90 degr, and 3-5% for larger angles.
At 20 and 24 MeV statistical uncertainties typically
50% larger than at low energies. A few points at the
back-angle minima had counting errors of over 10%.
Data received by email from R.K. Das, Nov. 1990.
Data errors above 11 MeV corrected to %.
degrees by comparison with Fig.5 in reference.
Corrected for dead time and background
